message:
Add comprehensive prompt detail page E2E tests (18 tests)

Tests cover:
- Content display (title, description, category, tags, token count)
- Copy button copies content to clipboard with feedback
- Install button is present and functional
- Download button triggers markdown file download
- Context textarea input
- Modal close with Escape key
- Modal close by clicking backdrop
- Direct navigation to /prompts/[id]
- Back to prompts link navigation
- 404 for invalid prompt IDs
- Mobile bottom sheet behavior
- Touch-friendly button heights
- Featured prompt badge display

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
